feed.title: newyorkbankruptcy.org -- Bankruptcy Information
feed.subtitle: Free bankruptcy information and guides from the Open Bankruptcy Project

entry.title: New York Bankruptcy -- Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
entry.summary: Free New York bankruptcy guide for 2026. Compare Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, local exemptions, filing costs, means test, and what to expect in your case.

entry.title: 341 Meeting of Creditors in New York -- What to Expect
entry.summary: What happens at the 341 meeting of creditors in New York? What questions the trustee asks, what documents to bring, how long it lasts, and tips for S.D.N.

entry.title: Automatic Stay in New York Bankruptcy -- Stop Collections, Garnishments, Foreclosure
entry.summary: The automatic stay stops creditor actions the moment you file bankruptcy in New York.

entry.title: Bank Accounts and Bankruptcy in New York
entry.summary: What happens to your bank account when you file bankruptcy in New York? Exemptions, frozen accounts, direct deposits, and protecting your money in S.D.N.Y.

entry.title: Can I Buy a Car While in Chapter 13? -- Newyorkbk
entry.summary: You need trustee approval and a court motion to purchase a vehicle during Chapter 13. [Newyorkbk ]

entry.title: Buying a House After Bankruptcy in New York
entry.summary: When can you buy a house after bankruptcy in New York? FHA, VA, conventional loan waiting periods, credit rebuilding, and New York housing market.

entry.title: Car Leases and Bankruptcy -- Newyorkbk
entry.summary: You have 60 days after filing to decide whether to assume (keep) or reject (surrender) your car lease. [Newyorkbk ]

entry.title: Chapter 13 Eligibility in New York
entry.summary: Chapter 13 eligibility requirements for New York filers. Debt limits, regular income requirement, prior filing restrictions, and S.D.N.Y. specifics.

entry.title: Chapter 13 Payments in New York
entry.summary: How Chapter 13 plan payments work in New York. Payment amounts, what gets paid, trustee fees, modifying payments, and what happens if you miss one.

entry.title: Chapter 13 Bankruptcy in New York -- Payment Plans, Dismissal Rates, Timeline
entry.summary: Guide to Chapter 13 bankruptcy in New York. Payment plan basics, S.D.N.Y. dismissal rate (59.0%), timeline, and what to expect.
